canonical_definition: A unified segmentation task that involves assigning a class label to every pixel, simultaneously performing instance segmentation for 'thing' classes and semantic segmentation for 'stuff' classes.
papers: OMG-LLaVA: Bridging Image-level, Object-level, Pixel-level Reasoning and Understanding
